news.t: Look to State Street, Invesco, VanEck for Top-Performing ETFs in 2026

holdings.infoBox: PTF is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 8.83%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 4.90%, Western Digital at 4.86%, Micron Technology at 4.79%, and NVIDIA at 4.27%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Technology Momentum ETF (PTF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks an index of U.S. tech firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PTF was launched on Oct 12, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: A Winning ETF Strategy in 2019: Catching Momentum in Non-Traditional Tech Names
data.text: The ETF industry has something for everyone -- the Invesco DWA Technology Momentum ETF (ticker: PTF), which looks to capture momentum in tech stocks.
